headlines.title: Cuba Bets on Solar Power as Energy Crisis Deepens
headlines.summary: Cuba has been experiencing a worsening energy crisis for several years, which previously led it to rely heavily on Venezuela for its fuel. Following the United States’ intervention in Venezuela in February, the energy crisis has grown even worse, as Cubans face regular blackouts

headlines.title: Morocco Is Emerging as a Renewable Energy Superpower
headlines.summary: Morocco is rapidly becoming a renewable energy powerhouse thanks to its favourable weather conditions and proximity to Europe. The North African country has rapidly developed its solar energy sector and is now looking to become a major green hydrogen and sustainable shipping hub.
